_parity_notice: This file is paired with PROJECT_INDEX.md in the same directory. Both files MUST agree on meta.generated, meta.version, file_counts, and gotchas[]. If they diverge, treat both as suspect and regenerate from source via /sc:index-repo. See user global CLAUDE.md → Paired Index Integrity Rules.

overview.purpose: Public-facing landing page and documentation for SanctissiMissa, a 1962 Traditional Latin Mass digital companion. Also vendors infrastructure-as-docs (nginx confs, deploy scripts, runbooks) for the self-hosted nginx LXC at 192.168.0.126.

concurrent_architect_work.task: Deduplicate Config, Fix CSP/YouTube, Audit Downloads (SITE_CONFIG refactor)
concurrent_architect_work.status: Tasks 1-7, 9, 10 complete as of 2026-04-08; tasks 8, 11, 12 pending
concurrent_architect_work.primary_outcome: All hardcoded version/URL/hash literals in index.html refactored into a single SITE_CONFIG JS block at index.html:7-33. Anything that previously regex-patched hardcoded strings in index.html (e.g., the CI workflow) is now broken — see gotcha #7.

ci_and_runners.summary: Self-hosted Forgejo Actions runner. NOT on 192.168.0.126 (nginx LXC) and NOT on 192.168.0.83 (failed github runner install). Runs in LXC CT 124 as forgejo-runner.robin.mba.
ci_and_runners.label_syntax_note: Forgejo Actions uses BARE labels (runs-on: linux-amd64), NOT GitHub Actions wrapping (runs-on: [self-hosted, linux-amd64]).
ci_and_runners.github_remote_status: currently authoritative; needs to be removed

root_files.purpose: Landing page; Tailwind CDN + Chart.js; SITE_CONFIG block at lines 7-33 is the version source of truth
App store privacy policy (off-brand styling — see gotcha #4); untracked

ci.runner_violation: Global CLAUDE.md mandates self-hosted runners. Should be runs-on: linux-amd64 (bare label, Forgejo Actions syntax). See gotcha #2.
ci.patch_logic_status: BROKEN — see gotcha #7. The sed patterns target hardcoded strings that no longer exist post-Windsurf SITE_CONFIG refactor.
actions: download new APK/EXE from input URLs
sed-patch hardcoded version + download links in index.html (NO LONGER MATCHES — gotcha #7)

versioning.source_of_truth: index.html:8-9 (SITE_CONFIG.version + SITE_CONFIG.build) — refactored from index.html:432 by Windsurf 2026-04-08

gotchas.title: Two deploy-to-lxc.sh files
gotchas.detail: Root-level ./deploy-to-lxc.sh is the legacy version; README references infrastructure/deployment/deploy-to-lxc.sh as canonical. They differ in argument handling.
gotchas.fix: Pick one and delete the other to prevent drift.

gotchas.title: GitHub workflow uses hosted runner — needs full migration to .forgejo/workflows/
gotchas.detail: runs-on: ubuntu-latest violates user global CLAUDE.md (All CI runs on self-hosted runners. GitHub-hosted runners are not used). The file should also move from .github/workflows/ to .forgejo/workflows/ per sibling-repo convention (HelloWord, DeepScriber). Forgejo Actions uses bare labels.
gotchas.fix: git mv .github/workflows/update-downloads.yml .forgejo/workflows/update-downloads.yml; change runs-on: ubuntu-latest → runs-on: linux-amd64; change secrets.PAT_TOKEN → secrets.FORGEJO_API_KEY; change git config user to Forgejo CI <ci@git.robin.mba>. Do this in the same change as gotcha #7.

gotchas.title: PROJECT_INDEX requires manual refresh
gotchas.detail: No CI hook updates this pair when index.html or version changes. Past versions of this index showed 0.1.1-alpha while live site was many releases ahead.
gotchas.fix: Either add an index update step to whatever process bumps version, or accept that the index is regenerated on demand via /sc:index-repo.

gotchas.title: privacy-policy.html styling diverges from brand — linked from landing page footer; still untracked
gotchas.detail: Uses purple gradient (#667eea → #764ba2) instead of the parchment/gold/crimson palette of index.html. Looks like an unedited template. index.html:1266 links to it from the footer, so this off-brand page IS reachable from production. File is also still untracked (?? in git status).
gotchas.fix: Re-skin to match landing page theme (parchment/gold/crimson), then git add.

gotchas.title: domains/ is a snapshot, not source
gotchas.detail: Files under domains/helloword.robin.mba/ and domains/sanctissimissa-app.robin.mba/ are READ-ONLY mirrors of production. Editing them does nothing.
gotchas.fix: Edit index.html at the repo root and deploy via infrastructure/deployment/deploy-to-lxc.sh.

gotchas.title: No build step / no package.json — ignore Vercel/Next.js hook suggestions
gotchas.detail: This is intentionally a static site loading Tailwind/Chart.js/fonts via CDN. No package.json, no .vercel/, no .env. Plugin hooks (chrome-devtools, vercel, etc.) may auto-suggest vercel:bootstrap, vercel:workflow, vercel:deployments-cicd based on filename matches when reading workflow or README files. None apply here. Deployment is self-hosted nginx LXC per global CLAUDE.md.
gotchas.fix: Do not introduce a build pipeline or Vercel integration without explicit user consent.

gotchas.title: CI workflow sed patterns are stale post-SITE_CONFIG refactor
gotchas.detail: The workflow uses sed -i to regex-patch hardcoded strings in index.html: data-version="…", sanctissimissa-android-apk-…\.apk, SanctissiMissa-Windows-…\.exe. After Windsurf's SITE_CONFIG refactor (CHECKLIST tasks 1-7, completed 2026-04-08), those hardcoded strings no longer exist — they live inside the SITE_CONFIG JS block at index.html:7-33. The next workflow trigger will silently no-op the version bump.
gotchas.fix: Rewrite the workflow's update step to patch SITE_CONFIG.version, SITE_CONFIG.build, and SITE_CONFIG.artifacts.{apk,exe,appimage,deb}.{file,sha256} fields directly. Address in the same change as gotcha #2.

external_canonical_sources: ~/forgejo/VE-forgejo-runners/README.md (CI runner topology, IPs, container, label strings)
~/.claude/CLAUDE.md (global runner policy, namespace conventions, PAT env-var naming)
